author: bosulmun
content:
[Current getBlobs CL support]
(Cross-check from CL devs required)
```
| CL Client    | getBlobsV3                             | getBlobsV4         |
|--------------|----------------------------------------|--------------------|
| lighthouse   | unstable (#9930)                       | draft pr (#9438)   |
| prysm        | partial-columns-integration (#16505)   | ❌                 |
| lodestar     | ❌                                     | ❌                 |
| teku         | ❌                                     | ❌                 |
| nimbus       | draft PR (#8066)                       | ❌                 | 
```

author: bosulmun
content: Additional to this, I assume it would be okay to jump to getBlobsV4, but what is the bottleneck in implementing getBlobsV3 ?

author: barnabasbusa
content: bottleneck is probably ppl who can work in this, in combination with work in glamsterdam

author: barnabasbusa
content: we just don’t have enough ppl on many teams working in this as it’s not a fork priority:/

author: tersec
content: https://github.com/status-im/nimbus-eth2/pull/8066 has `getBlobsV3`. We don't have `getBlobsV4` at all. But is `getBlobsV3` ever going to be the version to use, or yeah, is the idea to jump to V4?

author: tersec
content: if the goal is V4, and both (or only V4?) appear in Glamsterdam, it would make more sense for Nimbus to just pivot to V4 rather than do some dead-on-arrival V3. But I admit I haven't tracked this closely
